deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'python manage.py migrate --noinput; python manage.py collectstatic --noinput; nohup python manage.py init_project_data --force --skip-migrations > /tmp/seed.log 2>&1 & gunicorn config.wsgi_simple:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120 --access-logfile -'
